THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, HYUN INDIVIDUALLY & DBA FABRICARE CLEANERS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1919 FILLMORE ST SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFT THE SUM OF $160 PER DAY FOR EACH DAY FROM 01-FEB-97 UNTIL EXCLUSIVE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES IS RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF. SEE JUDGMENT FOR ANY FURTHER CONDITIONS
